creator: scf@FreeBSD.org
text:
I can confirm this issue on a system with HAL disabled for all ports
using ums0 and the following in /etc/rc.conf:
moused_enable="NO"
moused_nondefault_enable="NO"

I would like to also point out that even if I force the correct protocol
to SysMouse from auto, the mouse wheel is non-functional.  In my case,
almost all mouse movements and buttons are mapped to button 5 as noted
by xev.

Sean
-- 
scf@FreeBSD.org
